data.content: Implementation review rejected on 2026-03-10: acceptance criteria for beat detail alias display appear covered, but the modified backend change set still breaks the full test gate. 'bun run test' fails in src/lib/__tests__/knots-backend.test.ts:551 with 'infers parent from hierarchical dotted alias when id has no dots' because child?.parent is undefined instead of '8792'. Lint could not be confirmed via the session wrapper, while 'bunx tsc --noEmit' and 'bun run build' completed successfully.
